title: Air defense active
description: Ukraine will create a line of defense in the sea with interceptor drones, - Zelensky According to the president, drones will be launched from various platforms, including from sea drones. The defense line should protect Odessa and the entire region from air attacks. The future fleet will combine ships, aircraft, surface and underwater drones.
description_en: Ukraine will create a line of defense in the sea with interceptor drones, - Zelensky According to the president, drones will be launched from various platforms, including from sea drones. The defense line should protect Odessa and the entire region from air attacks. The future fleet will combine ships, aircraft, surface and underwater drones.
description_uk: Украина создаст в море линию обороны с дронами-перехватчиками, - Зеленский По словам президента, дроны будут запускать с различных платформ, в том числе с морских беспилотников. Линия обороны должна будет защитить Одессу и весь регион от воздушных атак. Будущий флот будет объединять корабли, авиацию, надводные и подводные дроны.

title: Kyiv: 31 killed, 102 injured
description: Update: Search and rescue operations end in Kyiv with 31 dead, 102 injured. Search and rescue operations at the site of a Russian strike on a residential building in Kyiv's Darnytskyi district concluded on July 4, Ukraine's State Emergency Service (DSNS) said. The death toll from Russia's July 2 mass attack on the capital rose to 31, with 102 people reported injured.
description_en: Update: Search and rescue operations end in Kyiv with 31 dead, 102 injured. Search and rescue operations at the site of a Russian strike on a residential building in Kyiv's Darnytskyi district concluded on July 4, Ukraine's State Emergency Service (DSNS) said. The death toll from Russia's July 2 mass attack on the capital rose to 31, with 102 people reported injured.
description_uk: Update: Search and rescue operations end in Kyiv with 31 dead, 102 injured. Search and rescue operations at the site of a Russian strike on a residential building in Kyiv's Darnytskyi district concluded on July 4, Ukraine's State Emergency Service (DSNS) said. The death toll from Russia's July 2 mass attack on the capital rose to 31, with 102 people reported injured.

description: I visited our soldiers in Odesa, who are undergoing treatment and rehabilitation after injuries. He spoke with defenders who fought in Kherson region, Mykolaiv region, Dnipro region, defended the Kinburn spit and the port of Odesa. He honored them with state awards. Thank you everyone for your service and protection of Ukraine. He also spoke with medics who save the lives of our soldiers. They carry out complex operations, provided...

Thank you everyone for your service and protection of Ukraine. He also spoke with medics who save the lives of our soldiers. They carry out complex operations, provided...

Поспілкувався із захисниками, які воювали на Херсонщині, Миколаївщині, Дніпровщині, захищали Кінбурнську косу та порт Одеси. Відзначив їх державними нагородами. title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: He addressed the participants of the session of the Parliamentary Assembly of the Organization for Security and Cooperation in Europe. Russia is using ballistic missiles as its last argument to continue this war. This is exactly what they are betting on. They want ballistic missiles to break our resistance and the will of the Ukrainian people. That is why we need more air defense. It is about the daily protection of life. Ukraine is critical...

Росія використовує балістичні ракети як свій останній аргумент, щоб продовжувати цю війну. Саме на це вони роблять ставку. Вони хочуть, щоб балістичні ракети зламали наш спротив і волю Українського народу. Саме тому нам потрібно більше ППО. Мова йде про щоденний захист життя. Україна критично...

title: Ukrainian UAVs have disabled 42.7% of Russia's oil refining capacity,...
title_en: Ukrainian UAVs have disabled 42.7% of Russia's oil refining capacity,...
title_uk: Українські БПЛА вивели з ладу 42,7% нафтопереробних потужностей Росії,...
description: Ukrainian UAVs have disabled 42.7% of Russia's oil refining capacity, - General Staff Over the last month, the Defense Forces have defeated 8 Russian refineries and destroyed or seriously damaged more than 60 tanks with oil and oil products. Since August 2025, damage to Russian oil refining has reached $13.5 billion.
description_en: Ukrainian UAVs have disabled 42.7% of Russia's oil refining capacity, - General Staff Over the last month, the Defense Forces have defeated 8 Russian refineries and destroyed or seriously damaged more than 60 tanks with oil and oil products. Since August 2025, damage to Russian oil refining has reached $13.5 billion.
description_uk: Украинские БПЛА вывели из строя уже 42,7% мощностей нефтепереработки рф, - Генштаб За последний месяц Силы обороны поразили 8 российских НПЗ и уничтожили или серьезно повредили более 60 резервуаров с нефтью и нефтепродуктами. С августа 2025 года ущерб российской нефтепереработке достиг $13,5 млрд.
